news.headline: PRE-BID MEETING: RfS DOCUMENT FOR ASSURED PEAK SUPPLY OF 4.8 GWh FROM ISTSCONNECTED RE PROJECTS IN INDIA, UNDER TARIFF-BASED COMPETITIVE BIDDING (SECI-FDRE-IX) – EQ
news.summary: PRE-BID MEETING: REQUEST FOR SELECTION (RfS) DOCUMENT FOR ASSURED PEAK SUPPLY OF 4.8 GWh (1200 MW X 4 Hrs.) FROM ISTSCONNECTED RE PROJECTS IN INDIA, UNDER TARIFF-BASED COMPETITIVE BIDDING (SECI-FDRE-IX) This is in reference to the RfS No. SECI/C&P/IPP/13/0006/26-27 dated 05.06.2026 regarding the
